tests.name: Environment tab registration SUB_TAB_LABELS includes 'Environment' for env tab
Environment tab registration SUB_TAB_ICONS includes an icon for env tab
Environment list panel renders sorted env vars displays env vars sorted alphabetically by key
Environment list header shows count and scope renders scope badge on each env var row
Environment empty state shows guidance when no env vars configured
Environment detail panel calls onSelect with env tag when env var row is clicked
Environment detail panel switching selection updates detail to the newly selected variable
Environment detail panel short boolean-like value displayed with full detail context
Environment detail panel renders env var detail with key, value, scope, and source
McpTab source attribution displays source origin on server card
McpTab source attribution displays plugin name as source for plugin-scoped servers
McpTab source attribution renders servers from multiple sources without layout issues
McpTab empty state references all config locations in empty state
ConfigDetailPanel McpDetail source attribution passes source to ScopeBadge for plugin servers
ConfigDetailPanel McpDetail source attribution shows source origin label in detail view
ConfigListPanel McpRow source attribution passes source to ScopeBadge for plugin servers in list
ConfigListPanel McpRow source attribution displays source origin for user-scoped servers in list
ConfigListPanel MCP empty state references all config locations in empty state
App renders via plugin system and layout engine renders the ZoneRenderer container instead of hardcoded views
App renders via plugin system and layout engine renders session list inside the main zone via view registry
App renders via plugin system and layout engine syncs theme to native menu on mount
App renders via plugin system and layout engine preserves the status bar footer with live metrics
App.tsx delegates view rendering to Layout Engine does not render SessionListView or EventDetailView directly in JSX
extractTopLevelEnvVars via parseSettings filters out all non-string values
extractTopLevelEnvVars via parseSettings results are always sorted alphabetically by key
extractTopLevelEnvVars via parseSettings scope matches the scope parameter passed to parseSettings
extractTopLevelEnvVars via parseSettings sets source to settings.json for each entry
extractTopLevelEnvVars via parseSettings sets filePath to empty string (populated by caller)
extractTopLevelEnvVars via parseSettings returns empty array when env block is an array
extractTopLevelEnvVars via parseSettings returns empty array when env block is a string
aggregateMcpFiles properties server count equals sum of servers across all mcp file entries
aggregateMcpFiles properties every server has non-empty source, scope, and filePath from its FileEntry
aggregateMcpFiles properties source and scope on each server match the originating FileEntry
aggregateMcpFiles properties malformed JSON entries produce zero servers and no crash
aggregateMcpFiles properties entries with no mcpServers key produce zero servers
aggregateMcpFiles properties empty mcpFiles array produces empty server list
parseMcpFileEntry guard: non-object JSON JSON array content produces zero servers
parseMcpFileEntry guard: non-object JSON JSON string content produces zero servers
parseMcpFileEntry guard: non-object JSON JSON number content produces zero servers
parseMcpFileEntry guard: non-object JSON JSON null content produces zero servers
parseMcpFileEntry guard: mcpServers not an object mcpServers as array produces zero servers
